code_prompt_defaults.object_description: a START-to-END icon path with six option icons labeled A-F and other icons
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_after_first_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately after the first "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_before_first_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately before the first "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_after_last_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately after the last "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_before_last_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately before the last "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_after_second_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately after the second "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text_before_second_shape_label: Which labeled icon comes immediately before the second "{target_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.question_text: How many path stops are strictly between the "{first_shape_name}" icon and the "{second_shape_name}" icon along the path from START to END?
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] bounding box in image pixel coordinates for the selected answer icon
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a string
